title: Cannvent Space community platform
summary: A separate community and participation surface for Cannvent, requiring its own information architecture, interface behaviour and translation of the wider brand language.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on executable digital behaviour implemented in a website, application, interface or connected software system.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on defining the system model, boundaries, structure, workflows or intended operation.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: System and product-definition responsibility: A separate community and participation surface for Cannvent, requiring its own information architecture, interface behaviour and translation of the wider brand language.

lensAssignments.rationale: This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on meaning, recognition, identity, visual language or the designed human experience.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Brand and experience-system responsibility: A separate community and participation surface for Cannvent, requiring its own information architecture, interface behaviour and translation of the wider brand language.
